## Summary

Provide a concise description of the change and the problem it solves.

## Related Issue

Link the issue number, if available.

## Changes

- List the main changes made in this PR.
- Include updates to contract behavior, tests, or documentation.

## Testing

Describe how this change was tested and the commands used.

## Checklist

- [ ] Code is formatted using `cargo fmt`
- [ ] Tests pass locally
- [ ] Relevant documentation updated
- [ ] No breaking changes unless explicitly noted
